overview: Stream Live TV, Movies, and Series from an Xtream-compatible server using this optimized plugin.
name: Jellyfin Xtream

versions.changelog: Fix: Make Execute method directly async for Jellyfin compatibility. Resolves TypeLoadException on plugin load that prevented plugin from being loaded.

Enable Scheduled Synchronization Task: XtreamIncrementalSyncTask now automatically syncs movies, series, and channels every 6 hours. Includes detailed task logging and improved memory management during scheduled operations.

Major Release: Expanded domain models with complete Xtream API field support (ratings, plot, episodes, genres, etc.). Comprehensive validation framework for pre-sync configuration checks. Complete test suite with integration examples. JSON converters for automatic stream_id/series_id mapping. Unix timestamp conversion to DateTime.
Stabilized manifest encoding and improved plugin loading compatibility with Jellyfin 10.11

description: Performance-optimized IPTV plugin for Xtream Codes API. Support for large catalogs with advanced caching and memory management.
